providers.name: Claude Max
providers.description: Anthropic Claude via Claude.ai Max plan. Full context window, highest rate limits.

models.name: Claude Haiku
models.description: Fast and affordable. Best for documentation, dependency audits, and light analysis tasks.

models.name: Claude Sonnet
models.description: Balanced capability and cost. Best for code generation, tests, and most implementation tasks.

models.name: Claude Opus
models.description: Maximum reasoning capability. Best for security audits, architecture reviews, and complex analysis.

providers.name: Claude Pro
providers.description: Anthropic Claude via Claude.ai Pro plan. Same model quality as Max but with lower monthly usage limits.

models.name: Claude Sonnet
models.description: Same Sonnet model as Claude Max at identical per-token rates, subject to Pro plan usage caps.
models.monthly_usage_limit_note: Subject to Claude Pro plan usage limits. May throttle on large tasks.

providers.name: ChatGPT Pro
providers.description: OpenAI models via ChatGPT Pro subscription. Flat-rate estimates per task based on observed usage.
providers.flat_rate_note: ChatGPT Pro is a flat monthly subscription. Per-task costs are estimates based on observed token usage and amortized plan cost.

models.name: GPT-4o
models.description: OpenAI's multimodal flagship model. Good for code generation and review tasks.

models.name: o3
models.description: OpenAI's reasoning-optimized model. Best for complex analysis, security audits, and architecture reviews.

providers.name: GitHub Copilot
providers.description: GitHub Copilot agent mode (Copilot Individual or Business). Flat-rate estimates per task.
providers.flat_rate_note: GitHub Copilot is a flat monthly subscription. Per-task costs are estimates based on observed agent session usage and amortized plan cost.

models.name: Copilot Agent
models.description: Copilot in agent mode using the underlying model (GPT-4o or Claude Sonnet depending on task). Best for code-heavy tasks within GitHub pull requests.
